title: Aureline settings-row state record
description: Boundary schema for one settings row state record frozen in docs/settings/settings_row_contract.md. A settings row is a specialization of the shared field_row_record contract (docs/ux/field_row_and_value_source_contract.md) constrained to settings surfaces: surface_family=settings_form and canonical_field_path matching the canonical setting_id pattern. The record carries row anatomy (label, value projection, source pill, effective-value inspector, state, help, actions, deep link, and optional search highlighting) so settings search, settings UI, CLI projections, docs links, support export, and policy explainers can reference an exact row without inventing a parallel model.

canonical_field_path.description: Canonical setting_id rendered as the row's canonical field path.
